name: EGB OE TL.Z./ZUMTOBEL
summary: Zumtobel Group AG is an international lighting group and a leading player in the field of innovative lighting solutions, lighting components and related services. Headquartered in Dornbirn, Austria, the company designs, manufactures and distributes lighting systems for a wide range of professional indoor and outdoor applications. Zumtobel operates primarily in Europe, North America and Asia-Pacific.
